div.h2: RFC 6528 — Preventing Sequence Number Prediction Attacks

g.text: Red = Vulnerable to ISN prediction attacks
Layer 2 | Connection Tuple | Unique per flow

div.p: RFC 6528 requires: • Clock component (changes frequently) • Cryptographic hash of connection tuple • Secret key (random, periodically rotated) This makes ISN prediction computationally infeasible within the TCP handshake timeout.
